legal_transitions.source_rule: Submit is allowed only from Draft and moves the order to Submitted.
ManagerApprove is allowed only from Submitted and moves the order to ManagerApproved.
ManagerReject is allowed only from Submitted and moves the order to Rejected.
FinanceApprove is allowed only from ManagerApproved and moves the order to FinanceApproved.
FinanceReject is allowed only from ManagerApproved and moves the order to Rejected.
Close is allowed only from FinanceApproved and moves the order to Closed.
EditAndResubmit is allowed only from Rejected and moves the order to Draft.

legal_transitions.trigger: the customer provides the correct pickup code within the pickup window
legal_transitions.source_rule: If the customer provides the correct pickup code within the pickup window, the order moves to PICKED_UP.

legal_transitions.trigger: the pickup window expires before pickup
legal_transitions.source_rule: If the pickup window expires before pickup, the order moves to EXPIRED.
From EXPIRED, staff may transition the order to RETURN_IN_TRANSIT.
If station staff report parcel damage, the order moves to HOLD_FOR_REVIEW.

steps: Trigger `the customer provides the correct pickup code within the pickup window`: READY_FOR_PICKUP -> PICKED_UP
Trigger `the pickup window expires before pickup`: PICKED_UP -> EXPIRED
covered_transitions: READY_FOR_PICKUP -> PICKED_UP [the customer provides the correct pickup code within the pickup window]
PICKED_UP -> EXPIRED [the pickup window expires before pickup]
